chart.title: VPN Events Over Time
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | timechart count by msg_type

chart.title: Connections by URI
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | stats count by destination | head 10

table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | stats count by host | head 10

chart.title: Connections by User
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | stats count by user | head 10

chart.title: Connections by Vserver
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | stats count by vserver| head 10

chart.title: VPN Event Types
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | stats count by msg_type | head 10

chart.title: Bytes Recieved Over Time by User
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | timechart useother=f sum(total_bytes_recv) by user

chart.title: Bytes Transfered Over Time by User
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_syslog SSLVPN | timechart useother=f sum(total_bytes_send) by user
